microsoft_ft: Partnered with enterprise stakeholders across engineering, security, and compliance to lead **technical discovery** for Azure resilience, mapping multi-stakeholder pain points to platform capabilities and driving **$14M+ business impact** (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp).

Led 0→1 build of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, owning product requirements and self-service workflows that **reduced operational toil 30%**, creating reusable assets and playbooks future engineers inherited as the function scaled.

Built tailored validation demos and presentations translating complex distributed-systems and AI capabilities into clear business value for both technical and non-technical executive audiences, surfacing critical hardware defects at a **94% recovery rate**.

Directed **14 cross-org executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** spanning legal, security, and infrastructure stakeholders.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months and establishing the standards, **battle cards**, and continuous-validation model that let cross-functional teams move faster and win.

Scaled team leverage by building an internal **AI agent** and restructuring planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time **39%** and increasing drill capacity 21% while feeding structured insights back to product on customer needs and gaps.
microsoft_2023: Championed product adoption of AI-driven code generation by running **user demos** and training sessions tailored to each team's workflows, driving utilization across **14 key teams** and saving 37 engineering hours monthly across Azure service orgs.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by leading **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating regulated-workflow needs into prioritized, customer-validated requirements.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time **83%** and improving how technical stakeholders evaluated and self-served answers.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions **28% faster** by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering teams across complex multi-stakeholder dependencies.

Mobilized a product strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, running **discovery with 20+ service teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact critical paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that tracked operational toil across 140+ teams, giving stakeholders a clear, data-driven view to drive faster decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping technical dependencies across 1,200+ stations alongside IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across a multi-team operational environment.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle **25%** and reducing manual handoffs across the release lifecycle.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by optimizing sales operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals** through a newly implemented CRM process that streamlined the full deal cycle.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and boosted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first **go-to-market strategy**, optimizing the website and Google business profile to better reflect how customers evaluated and bought.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks to inform data-driven deal strategy and pricing decisions.

tailoring_notes: Reframed Azure resilience work as pre-sales-style technical discovery, tailored demos, and multi-stakeholder (legal/security/compliance) engagement to mirror the SE JD.
Surfaced founding/0→1 builder language (playbooks, battle cards, reusable assets) and voice-of-customer feedback loops to match the founding Solutions Engineer mandate.
Prioritized JD tools (Salesforce, HubSpot, Jira, Figma, APIs, security/data handling) and emphasized translating complex AI value to technical + non-technical audiences.
